arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the state machine.

creation_date.description: The date and time when the state machine was created.

definition.description: The JSON or YAML representation of the state machine's workflow.

description.description: A user-provided description of the state machine.

id.description: The unique identifier of the state machine.

revision_id.description: The identifier for the current revision of the state machine.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role that is used by the state machine for execution.

status.description: The current status of the state machine, such as ACTIVE or DELETING.
